content.content:
1	import { withDb } from "./db.mjs";
2	
3	export async function ensureSchema(client) {
4	  await client.query(`
5	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounts (
6	      account_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
7	      name TEXT NOT NULL,
8	      tier TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (tier IN ('strategic','midmarket','standard')),
9	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('active','at-risk','churned'))
10	    )
11	  `);
12	  await client.query(`
13	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders (
14	      order_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
15	      account_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts(account_id),
16	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('pending','fulfilled','cancelled')),
17	      total_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
18	    )
19	  `);
20	  await client.query(`
21	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS line_items (
22	      line_item_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
23	      order_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(order_id),
24	      product_name TEXT NOT NULL,
25	      quantity INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
26	      unit_price_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
27	    )
28	  `);
29	  await client.query(`
30	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoices (
31	      invoice_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
32	      account_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts(account_id),
33	      amount_cents INTEGER NOT NULL,
34	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('paid','overdue','pending'))
35	    )
36	  `);
37	  await client.query(`
38	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS support_cases (
39	      case_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
40	      account_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts(account_id),
41	      priority TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (priority IN ('low','medium','high','critical')),
42	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('open','resolved','escalated'))
43	    )
44	  `);
45	}
46	
47	if (import.meta.url === `file://${process.argv[1]}`) {
48	  withDb((client) => ensureSchema(client)).then(() => console.log("schema ready")).catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });
49	}
50

content.content:
1	import { withDb } from "./db.mjs";
2	
3	export async function ensureSchema(client) {
4	  await client.query(`
5	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounts (
6	      account_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
7	      name TEXT NOT NULL,
8	      tier TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (tier IN ('strategic','midmarket','standard')),
9	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('active','at-risk','churned'))
10	    )
11	  `);
12	  await client.query(`
13	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders (
14	      order_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
15	      account_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts(account_id),
16	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('pending','fulfilled','cancelled')),
17	      total_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
18	    )
19	  `);
20	  await client.query(`
21	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS line_items (
22	      line_item_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
23	      order_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES orders(order_id),
24	      product_name TEXT NOT NULL,
25	      quantity INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
26	      unit_price_cents INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
27	    )
28	  `);
29	  await client.query(`
30	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoices (
31	      invoice_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
32	      account_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts(account_id),
33	      amount_cents INTEGER NOT NULL,
34	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('paid','overdue','pending'))
35	    )
36	  `);
37	  await client.query(`
38	    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS support_cases (
39	      case_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
40	      account_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts(account_id),
41	      priority TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (priority IN ('low','medium','high','critical')),
42	      status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('open','resolved','escalated'))
43	    )
44	  `);
45	}
46	
47	if (import.meta.url === `file://${process.argv[1]}`) {
48	  withDb((client) => ensureSchema(client)).then(() => console.log("schema ready")).catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });
49	}
50
